method: semantic source-trace: each chapter's operational/RECEIPT claim traced to real code in src/sovereign_agent/; skeptical (catch overclaims, not rubber-stamp)

trace.claim: append-only, hash-chained core; corrections are new receipts; balance computed by replay not stored
receipt binds what/when/who/prior-hash/seal; recompute matches; one altered byte breaks the chain
obligation cylinder carries dr/cr legs + evidence tier; manifest recomputes from chain
trace.verdict: MAPS (honest-scope: dr/cr at obligation LIFECYCLE, not account-level GL; manuscript L372-378 frames full GL as 'the shape the primitive is built for', not shipped)

trace.claim: material events are Propose-Approve-Execute; gate denies on non-approval (closed-by-default); records who approved
trace.source: ledger.py:263-329 (approve/close deny-by-default guards), compliance/human_approval_gate.py:85-99 (live principal-stamped disposition)

trace.claim: constitutional rules sealed at genesis; a violating entry cannot seal; rule changes are sealed human-approved events
trace.source: compliance/policy_loader.py:30-182 (versioned rules + Merkle root), ledger.py:313-317 (evidence-tier rule enforced at write); GENESIS-BLOCK-as-entry[0] NOT in code = Phase 2
trace.verdict: PARTIAL/PLANNED-HONEST (manuscript L580-627 is specification; honestly marked, not a running claim)

trace.claim: views are projections from the sealed chain; integrity recomputes seals from genesis; no silent 'probably ok'
trace.source: ledger.py:434-494 (replay/verify_chain memoized on file identity), projection.py:111-127 (recompute_chain)

trace.claim: immutable core vs traditional ERP (comparative; restates Ch2-6 guarantees)
five primitives compose immutable foundation; chain externally anchored gives independent verifiability
trace.source: primitives 4.5/5 in code (receipt/cylinder/human-gate/lens MAP, constitution PARTIAL); EXTERNAL-ANCHOR NOT in code
trace.verdict: HONEST-SCOPE/PLANNED (manuscript L629-647 marks anchor as 'a specification goal, not a claim it is running today')

board_fold_confirmed: lifecycle dr/cr vs GL double-entry distinction now explicit
'proves itself' downgraded to 'independently verifiable against an external anchor no single keyholder controls' (R3 catch)
Ch5 residual-trust-root subsection added (key custody + external anchoring)
overclaims_detected: NONE — every designed-but-unshipped capability (GL double-entry, genesis block, external anchor) is honestly scoped with explicit 'designed toward / specification goal, not shipped' signals; a reader of the RECEIPT boxes is not misled
verdict: PASS — manuscript claims either MAP to real code (Ch1-4,6,7) or are honestly marked specification/planned (Ch5,8); no overclaim; the 14 board findings were folded; fidelity holds. The two PLANNED gaps (constitution genesis block, external anchor) are surfaced to KM as judgment calls in the review brief, not hidden.
